channel.title: Beacons on Factorio Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Beacons on Factorio Guide

item.title: Factorio Beacon and Module Guide - 8-Beacon Layout and Optimization
item.description:
Beacons amplify module effects across multiple buildings. Beacon One beacon with Productivity speed modules can boost 8 nearby assemblers —if you lay them out correctly.

TL;DR: 8-beacon layout surrounds one assembler with 8 beacons. Fill beacons with speed modules, assemblers with productivity modules. Result: +30% productivity at +10% speed. The endgame standard for expensive recipes.

How Beacons Work

Beacons transmit module effects to nearby buildings:
